content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/topology/TopBar/TopologyNavigation.scss

Apply ALL of the following 4 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 17
Rule [sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-options-menu]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-c-options-menu' was removed in the new version. A simple version prefix swap to 'pf-v6-c-options-menu' does NOT produce a valid class — this class does not exist in the target CSS distribution.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a PatternFly component prop.

Incident context:
  className: pf-v5-c-options-menu

Code context:
```
   16  .odf-topology-nav__item {
   17      .pf-v5-c-options-menu__toggle:not(.pf-m-plain)::before {
   18          border: none;

```

### Fix 2
Line: 17
Rule [sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-options-menu-toggle]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-c-options-menu__toggle' was removed in the new version. A simple version prefix swap to 'pf-v6-c-options-menu__toggle' does NOT produce a valid class — this class does not exist in the target CSS distribution.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a PatternFly component prop.

Incident context:
  className: pf-v5-c-options-menu__toggle

Code context:
```
   16  .odf-topology-nav__item {
   17      .pf-v5-c-options-menu__toggle:not(.pf-m-plain)::before {
   18          border: none;

```

### Fix 3
Line: 17
Rule [semver-css-class-removed-c-options-menu]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-c-options-menu' has no equivalent in the new version. There is no valid 'pf-v6-c-options-menu' class — this class was removed, not renamed.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a component prop.

Incident context:
  className: pf-v5-c-options-menu

Code context:
```
   16  .odf-topology-nav__item {
   17      .pf-v5-c-options-menu__toggle:not(.pf-m-plain)::before {
   18          border: none;

```

### Fix 4
Line: 17
Rule [semver-css-class-removed-c-options-menu-toggle]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-c-options-menu__toggle' has no equivalent in the new version. There is no valid 'pf-v6-c-options-menu__toggle' class — this class was removed, not renamed.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a component prop.

Incident context:
  className: pf-v5-c-options-menu__toggle

Code context:
```
   16  .odf-topology-nav__item {
   17      .pf-v5-c-options-menu__toggle:not(.pf-m-plain)::before {
   18          border: none;

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/odf/components/topology/TopBar/TopologyNavigation.scss
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its full contents.

Now let me reason through all 4 fixes:

**All 4 fixes target the same line (17)** and the same selector: `.pf-v5-c-options-menu__toggle:not(.pf-m-plain)::before`

- **Fix 1**: `pf-v5-c-options-menu` class was removed, no v6 equivalent exists.
- **Fix 2**: `pf-v5-c-options-menu__toggle` class was removed, no v6 equivalent exists.
- **Fix 3**: Same as Fix 1 — `pf-v5-c-options-menu` has no equivalent.
- **Fix 4**: Same as Fix 2 — `pf-v5-c-options-menu__toggle` has no equivalent.

All four fixes tell us the same thing: the `pf-v5-c-options-menu` component and its `__toggle` element class have been completely removed from PatternFly with no v6 replacement. The entire CSS rule block on lines 16-19 that uses this selector is targeting a class that no longer exists. 

The PatternFly `OptionsMenu` component was removed in v6 (replaced by `MenuToggle`/`Select`). The selector `.pf-v5-c-options-menu__toggle:not(.pf-m-plain)::before` will never match any element in a PF v6 app, making the entire rule block dead code.

The outer rule `.odf-topology-nav__item { ... }` contains only this one nested rule, so the entire block (lines 16-20) should be removed.

The file looks correct. The dead CSS rule block targeting the removed `pf-v5-c-options-menu__toggle` class has been removed, and the remaining rules (the `.odf-topology` block and the `.odf-topology-nav__item-storage-cluster-link` rule) are preserved unchanged.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Detail |
|-----|------|--------|--------|
| Fix 1 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-options-menu` | ✅ Applied | Removed the entire `.odf-topology-nav__item { .pf-v5-c-options-menu__toggle:not(.pf-m-plain)::before { border: none; } }` block (lines 16-20) since the `pf-v5-c-options-menu` class was removed in PF v6 with no replacement, making the rule dead code. |
| Fix 2 | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-c-options-menu-toggle` | ✅ Applied | Same removal — the `__toggle` BEM element class is part of the same deleted selector on the same line. |
| Fix 3 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-options-menu` | ✅ Applied | Same removal — duplicate detection of the same removed class by a different rule. |
| Fix 4 | `semver-css-class-removed-c-options-menu-toggle` | ✅ Applied | Same removal — duplicate detection of the same removed `__toggle` class by a different rule. |

All four fixes targeted the same selector on line 17. The entire containing rule block was removed since it consisted solely of a selector referencing removed PatternFly classes with no v6 equivalent. No other code in the file was affected.
